flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Vassar College rose 16% between 2006 and 2009 ($36.1k → $41.9k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Vassar College rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($62.9k → $71.0k).

flags.label: Earnings trend · post-entry horizons
flags.summary: Earnings 10 years post-entry at Vassar College are 45% above 6-year earnings ($49.2k → $71.4k).
